audience: Comic book collectors aged 25-45 who actively bid in online auctions and have previously purchased Silver Age Marvel books
core_message: This week's auction features the rarest Silver Age Marvel collection we've seen in two years — bid now before it's gone forever
supporting_points: 40 Silver Age books graded CGC 8.0 or higher — the highest concentration in a single auction this year
Starting bids set at 30% below recent market comparables for this grade tier
Auction closes Sunday at 10pm ET — no extensions, no second chances
call_to_action: Register and place your opening bid before Sunday 10pm ET
offer: Free shipping on all winning bids over $200 this auction

success_metrics.primary_metric: Auction registration rate from campaign traffic
success_metrics.baseline: Previous auction: 12% registration rate from email
success_metrics.timeframe: 7 days from campaign launch to auction close

email.angle: Exclusive first look for serious collectors

social_post.format: carousel of top 5 books with grades
